ddls:
CREATE TABLE "improvement_resources" (
  "improvement_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the improvement type */,
  "improvement_type" TEXT /* Type of improvement (e.g., IMPROVEMENT_FARM, IMPROVEMENT_MINE) */,
  "resource_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the resource type */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., RESOURCE_WHEAT, RESOURCE_IRON) */,
  "resource_makes_valid" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the improvement makes the resource valid for use */,
  "resource_trade" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the resource can be traded */,
  "discovery_rand" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the resource has a random discovery requirement */,
  "quantity_requirement" INTEGER /* Integer indicating the quantity requirement for the resource */,
  "improvement_effect" TEXT /* Description of the effect of the improvement on the resource */,
  "resource_cost" INTEGER /* The cost to build the improvement in terms of resources */,
  "build_time" INTEGER /* The time required to build the improvement */,
  "maintenance_cost" INTEGER /* The ongoing cost to maintain the improvement */,
  "max_quantity" INTEGER /* The maximum quantity of the resource that can be produced by the improvement */,
  "resource_multiplier" REAL /* A multiplier that affects the production rate of the resource */,
  "discovery_probability" REAL /* The probability of discovering the resource (if discovery_rand is true) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("improvement_type_id", "resource_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "improvement_types" (
  "improvement_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the improvement type */,
  "improvement_type" TEXT /* Type of improvement (e.g., IMPROVEMENT_FARM, IMPROVEMENT_MINE) */,
  "improvement_description" TEXT /* Description of the improvement */,
  "improvement_cost" INTEGER /* The cost to build the improvement */,
  "improvement_build_time" INTEGER /* The time required to build the improvement */,
  "improvement_maintenance_cost" INTEGER /* The ongoing cost to maintain the improvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("improvement_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_types" (
  "resource_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the resource type */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., RESOURCE_WHEAT, RESOURCE_IRON) */,
  "resource_description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "resource_base_yield" INTEGER /* The base yield of the resource */,
  "resource_trade_value" INTEGER /* The trade value of the resource */,
  "resource_discovery_probability" REAL /* The probability of discovering the resource */,
  "resource_max_quantity" INTEGER /* The maximum quantity of the resource that can be produced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_type_id")
)
